<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **New Features**

  - Added SOFA (Form 107) financial history collection to the intake wizard, allowing users to enter prior income and creditor payment details
  - Implemented schema-driven form filling system for improved consistency and reproducibility across forms
  - Form 101 now uses centralized schema-based field mapping

- **Documentation**

  - Added comprehensive design specifications and implementation plans for the form-fill engine and Form 101 schema integration

- **Tests**
  - Extensive test coverage added for form resolution, SOFA data models, API endpoints, and end-to-end SOFA journey

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Walkthrough

Introduces a schema-driven form-fill engine replacing hand-authored `pdf_field_map()` methods for Forms 101 and 107. Adds JSON schemas, `FieldSpec`/`FormSchema` dataclasses, a draft-schema ingest command, a binding resolver with repeat-group overflow handling, SOFA hybrid data models (`SOFAReport`, `SOFAPriorIncome`, `SOFACreditorPayment`, `FormAnswer`) with a REST API, a new `/sofa` React intake step, and comprehensive tests plus design docs.

## Changes

**Schema-Driven Form-Fill Engine and SOFA Intake**

| Layer / File(s)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Summary                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Schema engine: dataclasses, loader, validator, ingest command, and form_101.json** <br> `backend/config/settings/base.py`, `backend/apps/forms/schema.py`, `backend/apps/forms/management/commands/ingest_form_schema.py`, `data/forms/schemas/form_101.json`, `Dockerfile.heroku`, `.gitignore`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_schema.py`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_ingest_command.py`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_engine_form_agnostic.py`                                                                                                      | Adds `FORM_SCHEMAS_DIRECTORY` setting, `FieldSpec`/`FormSchema` immutable dataclasses, `load_schema`, `template_field_names`, `validate_schema`, and the `ingest_form_schema` management command with SHA-256 drift detection. Ships the curated 2 023-line `form_101.json` schema and copies the schemas directory into the Heroku Docker image. Tests cover hash determinism, draft-schema shape invariants, command write/drift/no-drift paths, loader/validator error cases, and form-agnostic engine acceptance. |
| **SOFA hybrid data models, migration, serializers, viewset, and seed data** <br> `backend/apps/intake/models.py`, `backend/apps/intake/migrations/0007_...py`, `backend/apps/intake/serializers.py`, `backend/apps/intake/views.py`, `backend/apps/intake/urls.py`, `backend/apps/intake/management/commands/seed_demo_data.py`, `backend/apps/intake/tests/test_sofa_models.py`, `backend/apps/intake/tests/test_sofa_views.py`                                                                                                                               | Adds `SOFAReport`, `SOFAPriorIncome`, `SOFACreditorPayment`, and `FormAnswer` Django models with migration `0007`. Three DRF serializers implement replace-on-write nested rows. `SOFAReportViewSet` scopes reads/writes to the authenticated user's session via `get_or_create`. Route registered at `sofa-report/`. Demo seed data extended with Maria's SOFA payload. Tests cover model relationships, `FormAnswer` uniqueness, and all GET/PATCH endpoint behaviors.                                              |
| **Derivations, predicates, and fill resolver** <br> `backend/apps/forms/services/derivations.py`, `backend/apps/forms/services/fill_resolver.py`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_derivations.py`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_fill_resolver.py`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Adds `DERIVATIONS` and `PREDICATES` registries (including `FormAnswer`-backed `has_attorney` predicate), `resolve_binding` for `answer:` and `sofa.` path patterns, `RepeatOverflow` exception, and `resolve()` which dispatches by source type, gates on predicates, enforces repeat capacity, and coerces checkbox on-states. Tests cover all binding paths, conditional skipping, repeat expansion and overflow, legal-review guard, and predicate truth tables.                                                   |
| **Generator delegation, download view error handling, and template_version stamping** <br> `backend/apps/forms/services/form_101_generator.py`, `backend/apps/forms/services/form_107_generator.py`, `backend/apps/forms/models.py`, `backend/apps/forms/migrations/0003_...py`, `backend/apps/forms/views.py`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_coverage.py`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_download_action.py`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_pdf_field_maps.py`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_form_views.py`, `backend/apps/forms/tests/test_registry.py` | Delegates `Form101Generator` and `Form107Generator` `pdf_field_map()` to `load_schema` + `resolve`. Adds `GeneratedForm.template_version` field and migration. Download action catches `RepeatOverflow`→422 and `FileNotFoundError`→500, stamps `template_version`, and calls `save()` unconditionally. Coverage proof tests assert all applicable required fields resolve for both forms with multi-source values.                                                                                                   |
| **Frontend SOFA step: types, API client, SOFAStep component, routing, styling, and E2E** <br> `frontend/src/types/api.ts`, `frontend/src/api/client.ts`, `frontend/src/pages/SOFAStep.tsx`, `frontend/src/App.tsx`, `frontend/src/pages/IntakeWizard.tsx`, `frontend/src/styles/global.css`, `frontend/src/test/mocks/handlers.ts`, `frontend/src/pages/__tests__/IntakeWizard.test.tsx`, `frontend/e2e/pages/sofa.page.ts`, `frontend/e2e/pages/wizard.page.ts`, `frontend/e2e/journeys/sofa-journey.spec.ts`                                                 | Adds `SOFAPriorIncome`, `SOFACreditorPayment`, and `SOFAReport` TypeScript interfaces and `sofaReportAPI` get/patch methods. `SOFAStep` component renders gated prior-income and creditor-payment row editors, saves cleaned data, and navigates to `/forms`. Wires `/sofa` route into `App.tsx` and redirects `IntakeWizard` there on fee-waiver qualification. Ships CSS, MSW mocks, unit test route stub, `SOFAPage` Playwright object, and full E2E SOFA journey spec.                                            |
| **Design specs, implementation plans, and findings docs** <br> `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-16-form-fill-engine-design.md`, `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-16-form-fill-engine-findings.md`, `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-17-form-101-schema-design.md`, `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-16-form-fill-engine.md`, `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-17-form-101-schema-plan.md`                                                                                                                                                                           | SP1 design spec (architecture, binding grammar, resolver rules, UPL guard), SP1 implementation plan (Phases A–F with step-by-step tasks), SP1 carry-findings report (coverage metrics, predicate registry, repeat overflow semantics, Heroku deployment requirements, SP2 handoff), Form 101 schema design spec, and Form 101 implementation plan.                                                                                                                                                                    |

## Sequence Diagram(s)

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant Client
  participant DownloadView
  participant Generator
  participant Resolver
  participant PDFFormFiller

  Client->>DownloadView: GET /api/forms/{id}/download/
  DownloadView->>Generator: pdf_field_map()
  Generator->>Resolver: resolve(load_schema(form_type), session)
  Resolver-->>Generator: field_map
  Generator-->>DownloadView: field_map
  DownloadView->>PDFFormFiller: fill(template, field_map)
  PDFFormFiller-->>DownloadView: PDF bytes
  DownloadView-->>Client: PDF download response
```

## Estimated code review effort

🎯 5 (Critical) | ⏱️ ~120 minutes
